title: Mahmoud Khalil’s appeal against deportation rejected by immigration board; re-arrest looms
content:
Here are 3 bullet points summarizing the headline:

*   Mahmoud Khalil's appeal against his deportation has been rejected.
*   The decision was made by an immigration board.
*   His re-arrest is now imminent following this ruling.

title: At ICA conference, CJI Surya Kant underscores arbitration’s role in global economy
content:
Here are 3 bullet points summarizing the headline:

*   CJI Surya Kant delivered a speech at an ICA conference.
*   He emphasized the significant role of arbitration.
*   The CJI highlighted arbitration's crucial contribution to the global economy.

title: RBI issues draft on review of NBFC-Upper Layer framework
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   The Reserve Bank of India (RBI) has released a new proposal document.
*   This draft document outlines a review of the existing regulatory framework for Non-Banking Financial Companies (NBFCs) categorized in the 'Upper Layer'.
*   Being a 'draft,' it is open for public comments and feedback before any final regulations are issued.

title: At ICA conference, CJI Surya Kant underscores arbitration’s role in global economy
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   CJI Surya Kant spoke at a conference organized by the ICA.
*   He emphasized the critical importance of arbitration.
*   This emphasis was specifically on arbitration's role in the global economy.

title: Tamil Nadu voter deleted from electoral roll reminds Supreme Court of promise to protect in case of ‘mass exclusion’
content:
A voter from Tamil Nadu has been deleted from the electoral roll.
*   This individual deletion has prompted a reminder to the Supreme Court of India.
*   The reminder specifically refers to the Supreme Court's previous promise to protect voters against instances of "mass exclusion" from the electoral rolls.

title: Supreme Court steps in after transwoman teacher seeks work
content:
The Supreme Court has intervened in a case involving a transwoman teacher.
*   The legal action stems from the teacher's efforts to secure employment.
*   The Court's involvement suggests a review of issues related to employment rights or potential discrimination for transgender individuals.
